metadata.title: Synaply - AI ukhamarak Spaced Repetition ukanakamp vocabulario yatiqañataki
metadata.description: Arunaka yatiqañataki ch'amancht'aña AI-powered spaced repetition ukanakamp. Sapa mayni arunaka lutanaka luraña jan ukax jaqinakamp uñt'ayata lutanakat yatiqaña.
metadata.keywords: inglés yatiqaña, spaced repetition, vocabulario luraña, flashcards, AI arunaka yatiqaña, arunaka lutanaka, arunaka yatiqañataki app, español yatiqaña, francés yatiqaña, alemán yatiqaña, arunaka uñt'aña, arunaka amtaña, SRS yatiqaña
metadata.og_description: Arunaka yatiqañataki ch'amancht'aña AI-powered spaced repetition ukanakamp. Juk'amp jank'aki yatiqaña, juk'amp pacha amtaña.
metadata.og_image_alt: Synaply AI Arunaka Yatiqaña App Interface
metadata.twitter_title: Synaply - Arunaka Machaqanaka Yatiqaña Ch'ama lurañampi
metadata.twitter_description: Synaply ukaruw uñt'ayasiñama vocabulario jach'anchayañataki smart spaced repetition ukhamarak AI ukanakamp.

common.title: Suti
common.footer_help_text: Help us improve! Share your ideas, report bugs, or request features:

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: {target} aruta yatiqaskta {source} aruta
dashboard.community_lists_desc: Yaqha jaqinakana arunaka lutanaka ukhamarak playlist ukanaka uñakipt'aña.
dashboard.ai_practice_desc: Vocabulario jach'anchayaña AI-lurat oración ukanaka jaqukiptaspa kawkir temat jan ukax arunaka lutamata.
dashboard.manage_words_desc: Arunaka uñjaña, thaqhaña, turkayaña jan ukax picharaña.
dashboard.import_error_retry: Janiw machaq aru imatäkiti. Mayamp yant'añäni!
dashboard.select_topic_error: Mayt'asipxsmawa mä tema ajlliñamataki jan ukax qillqañamataki.
dashboard.ai_translation_notice: AI yanapaniwa qhanañchawimpi ukhamarak uñacht'äwi oraciónmpi
dashboard.delete_all_confirm: ¿TAQPACHA arunaka picharañ munaqtati? Aka lurañax janiw wasitat kutt'ankaspati.
dashboard.no_words_found: Janiw arunaka jikxataskiti. Yaqha thaqhawi yant'aña jan ukax arunaka yapaña!
dashboard.no_words_for_lesson: Janiw yatiqañataki arunaka jikxataskiti. Mayt'asipxsmawa nayrax machaq arunaka yapañamataki!
dashboard.no_words_to_review: Jichhürux janiw uñakipt'añataki arunaka utjkiti. Qhipat kutañäni jan ukax machaq arunaka yapaña!
dashboard.practice_topic_hint: Ch'usa jaytañax vocabulario arunakat oración lurañäni.
dashboard.footer_help_text: ¡Yanapt'apxita juk'amp suma lurañataki! Amuyunaka uñt'ayaña, pantjawinaka uñt'ayaña:

onboarding.strategy_desc: Synaply suma apnaqañataki, aka estrategia iyawsapxsmawa:
onboarding.step1_desc: Mä 100 arunaka mä temaru (sañataki: Negocios jan ukax Saräwinaka) yapaña.
onboarding.step3_desc: AI Yant'añaru kutaña arunaka oración ukanakana apnaqañataki.

dashboard.publish_desc: Aka {count} arunaka yaqha jaqinakamp uñt'ayaña. Jaqinakatak Lutanaka ukan uñstani.

ai_word_info.error_coffee_break: AI mä juk'a k'uchuqt'askiwa. Juk'at yant'aña!
ai_word_info.error_generic: ¡Pantjasiwa! Janiw AI insights jikxatktiti. Mayamp yant'aña!

public_lists.title: Jaqinakatak Arunaka Lutanaka
public_lists.subtitle: Yaqha jaqinakan lurat arunaka lutanaka uñakipt'aña.
public_lists.search_placeholder: Lutanaka thaqhaña suti jan ukax qhanañchawimpi...
public_lists.no_lists_desc: Yaqha thaqhawi yant'aña jan ukax arunaka filtro turkayaña.

detail.title: Lutama Detalles
detail.delete_confirm: ¿Aka jaqinakatak lutama picharañ munaqtati? Janiw kutt'ankaspati.
detail.duplicate_error: Jaqichat arunaka utjiwa. Picharaña nayrax imarañataki.

profile.terms_welcome: Synaply ukaru jutam. Aka servicio apnaqasaxa, aka arunaka iyawsta...
profile.title: Perfil Configuración
profile.subtitle: Sapa mayni uñt'ayawinaka ukhamarak aru configuración apnaqaña
profile.terms_beta_warning: Important Beta Notice: Synaply is currently in its beta testing phase. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are participating in a testing period and understand the risks associated with pre-release software.
profile.terms_intro_text: By accessing or using Synaply, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this site.
profile.terms_beta_text: Synaply is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis for beta testing purposes. You explicitly acknowledge and agree that: (a) The service may contain bugs, errors, and experience frequent interruptions. (b) We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time without notice. (c) CRITICAL: During the beta period, we may perform database resets or deletions. This means all your data, including progress, word lists, and account information, may be permanently deleted without prior warning. You are responsible for maintaining your own backups of any important data.
profile.terms_accounts_text: To use certain features, you must register for an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.
profile.terms_content_text: Our service allows you to post, link, store, share and otherwise make available certain information, text, graphics, or other material. You are responsible for the content you post. Synaply retains all rights to its original content, features, and functionality, which are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
profile.terms_conduct_text: You agree not to use the service for any unlawful purpose or to solicit others to perform or participate in any unlawful acts. You shall not attempt to interfere with the proper working of the service, including through viruses, denial of service attacks, or any other harmful technology.
profile.terms_liability_text: In no event shall Synaply, nor its directors, employees, partners, or agents, be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from your access to or use of or inability to access or use the service.
profile.terms_changes_text: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. We will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect for significant changes. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
profile.terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us through the support channels provided on the website.

best_practice.title: Nayraru sartañataki suma luraña
best_practice.step1_desc: Mä 100 arunaka mä temaru (sañataki: Saräwinaka jan ukax Negocios) yapaña.
best_practice.step3_desc: AI Yant'añaru kutaña arunaka oración ukanakana apnaqañataki.

getting_started.title: Qalltañataki
getting_started.desc: Synaply mä ch'amani herramienta ukawa vocabulario jach'anchayañataki spaced repetition ukhamarak artificial intelligence ukanakamp.
getting_started.step1_desc: Arunaka sapa mayni yapaña jan ukax AI-mp lutanaka luraña.
getting_started.step2_desc: Vocabulario Review apnaqaña arunaka amtañataki FSRS algorithm-amp.

manual.title: Sapa mayni qillqaña
manual.desc: Aru ukhamarak jaqukiptawi qillqaña. Mä nota yapaña suma amtañataki.

ai_list.title: Lutanaka luraña (AI Word List)
ai_list.desc: Nivel (A1-C2) ukhamarak tema ajlliña, AI (Gemini) mä lutama lurani yapantañataki.

ai_insights.title: AI Insights
ai_insights.desc: Sapa arutaki, AI sinonimonaka, apnaqäwinaka uñacht'ayaspawa.

spaced_repetition.title: Spaced Repetition
spaced_repetition.desc: Synaply FSRS algorithm apnaqi pacha amtañataki sapa aru.
spaced_repetition.step2: Jaqukiptawi qillqaña ukhamarak Enter jan ukax Arsuwi Uñakipt'aña ch'iqaña.
spaced_repetition.step3: Jan amtktaxa — "Janiw amtkti" ch'iqaña arsuwi uñjañataki.

ai_practice.title: AI Yant'aña: Oración Jaqukiptaña
ai_practice.desc: Aka lurañax gramática ukhamarak contexto yatiqañatakiwa AI-mp lurat oraciónnaka jaqukiptasaxa.
ai_practice.step1: Mä tema ajlliña jan ukax ch'usa jaytaña.
ai_practice.step4: AI pantjawinaka uñacht'ayani ukhamarak suma jaqukiptawi qhanañchayini.

dictionary_management.title: Diccionario Apnaqaña
dictionary_management.search: Thaqhaña: Search bar apnaqaña arunaka jank'aki jikxatñataki.
dictionary_management.delete_all: Taqpacha arunaka picharaña: Diccionario ch'usachaña mayaki ch'iqasaxa.

progress.title: Nayraru Sartaña ukhamarak Puntos
progress.desc: Puntos (header-ana) uñacht'ayi qawqha arunaka waliki jaqukiptawayta.

not_authorized_admin: You do not have administrator permissions to view this page.
